services.name: Aromatherapy Massage
services.longDescription: Aromatherapy massage combines carefully selected essential oils with gentle massage techniques. Lavender, ylang-ylang and sandalwood support mental and physical relaxation. Reduces stress and improves sleep quality.

services.name: Deep Tissue Massage
services.longDescription: Deep tissue massage uses firm pressure to reach the deeper layers of muscle. Ideal for chronic tension, sports injuries and posture-related discomfort.

services.name: Hot Stone Massage
services.longDescription: Heated volcanic basalt stones are placed on strategic points of the body. The warmth deeply relaxes muscles and amplifies the effect of the therapist's manual techniques.

services.name: Swedish Massage
services.longDescription: A classic technique using long, flowing strokes. Ideal for first-time guests; creates a gentle full-body release.

services.name: Thai Massage
services.shortDescription: The art of stretching and pressure
services.longDescription: Traditional Thai massage blends passive yoga poses, acupressure and pressure-point techniques. Performed on a mat in loose clothing. Increases flexibility and balances energy flow.

services.name: Couples Massage
services.longDescription: A special moment to share with your loved one. Side-by-side massage tables, two therapists working in sync. Ideal for romantic getaways or special celebrations.

services.name: Hydrating Facial
services.longDescription: Enriched with hyaluronic acid and natural humectants, this facial fills the skin with moisture from within. Ideal for dry and dull complexions.

services.name: Anti-Aging Facial
services.longDescription: Formulated with peptide complexes, retinol derivatives and antioxidants, this facial reduces the appearance of fine lines and improves skin firmness.

services.name: Purifying Facial
services.longDescription: Charcoal- and clay-based, this facial draws impurities out of the pores for a deep cleanse. Balances oil and suits acne-prone skin.

services.name: Brightening Facial
services.longDescription: Featuring vitamin C and niacinamide, this facial corrects uneven tone, lightens spots and revives dull, tired complexions.

services.name: Express Facial
services.longDescription: A quick refresh in the middle of a busy day or before a special event. A compact ritual covering cleansing, exfoliation and an intensive mask.

services.name: Luxury Gold Ritual
services.longDescription: Finished with 24-karat gold leaf, this signature ritual is a true luxury experience. Collagen mask, deep facial massage and gold infusion leave the skin with a renewed glow.

services.name: Body Scrub
services.longDescription: A blend of natural sugar and essential oils gently sloughs away dead skin cells. Leaves the skin smooth, soft and silky.

services.name: Body Wrap Therapy
services.longDescription: An algae- and clay-based wrap that helps the skin release toxins and firm up. Reshapes the body's contours and reduces the appearance of cellulite.

services.name: Anti-Cellulite Treatment
services.longDescription: Combining lymphatic drainage massage with active-ingredient creams, this treatment reduces the look of cellulite, stimulates lymph flow and improves body contour.

services.name: Back Treatment
services.shortDescription: Cleansing and care for the back
services.longDescription: A back-specific ritual combining deep cleansing, exfoliation and hydration. Suits acne-prone or dry back skin.

services.name: Hand & Foot Care
services.longDescription: Treat your hands and feet to a renewing ritual. Exfoliation, hydrating mask and massage leave the skin smooth and the nails healthy.

services.name: Signature Body Ritual
services.longDescription: Our signature ritual combines exfoliation, wrap, massage and hydration for a full surrender. Reserve two hours just for yourself.

services.name: Classic Hammam
services.longDescription: Experience the most authentic form of the centuries-old Turkish hammam tradition. Rest on warm marble, deep cleanse with the kese mitt, then a generous foam wash.

services.name: Sultan's Hammam
services.longDescription: A comprehensive ritual that adds massage and a facial to the hammam experience. Step into a sultan's bathing tradition. Classic exfoliation, massage and hydration combined.

services.name: Couples Hammam
services.longDescription: A traditional experience for two in a private hammam space. An unforgettable moment for romantic escapes or special celebrations.

services.name: Moroccan Bath
services.shortDescription: Black soap and rose water ritual
services.longDescription: Inspired by Moroccan tradition, this ritual uses black soap, exfoliation and rose water to deeply cleanse and revive the skin. An exotic experience.

services.name: Exfoliation & Foam
services.longDescription: A quick traditional cleanse. Refresh your skin in 30 minutes with kese exfoliation and foam. Ideal when time for longer rituals is short.

services.name: Hammam & Massage Combo
services.shortDescription: Hammam followed by a relaxing massage
services.longDescription: Continue the classic hammam experience with a 45-minute aromatherapy massage. Once your skin is purified, the massage's benefits go even deeper.

services.name: Half-Day Wellness
services.longDescription: A 3-hour curated programme combining hammam, massage and facial. Dedicate half a day entirely to yourself.

services.name: Full-Day Wellness
services.longDescription: This 5-hour package includes hammam, massage, facial, body treatment, a light lunch and tea service. A truly luxurious escape.

services.name: Couples Package
services.shortDescription: To share with your loved one
services.longDescription: A package for two: couples massage, couples hammam and a private lunch. Perfect as a romantic gift or for a special celebration.

services.name: Bridal Package
services.longDescription: A package designed for the bride before her wedding day: luxury facial, body scrub, massage and manicure-pedicure. The perfect bridal preparation.

services.name: Detox Package
services.longDescription: A detox-focused package: body wrap, lymphatic drainage massage and brightening facial. Cleanse your body inside out.

services.name: Stress Relief Package
services.longDescription: A stress-relief package: aromatherapy massage, head and shoulder massage and hot stone therapy. Mental and physical relaxation in one.
